title: oxydectes helichrysum
intro: Oxydectes helichrysum, also known as Immortelle or Helichrysum, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its bright yellow or white daisy-like flowers. The medicinal properties of Oxydectes helichrysum lie in its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and pain, improving skin health, and supporting digestion, as well as its potential to reduce the risk of certain diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. Oxydectes helichrysum can be prepared as an herbal tea, oil, or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy and skincare products due to its soothing and rejuvenating properties.
